title: Hacking HR LinkedIn Live: Why Good Companies Go Bad
summary: Eric joins Hacking HR founder Enrique Rubio for a live conversation on LinkedIn, reaching a community of over one million HR and people leaders.
blockquote: Why do good companies go bad, even when the people leading them genuinely care? Mission drift is not a leadership character problem, but a design problem. This conversation matters for everyone in HR and people leadership who has ever watched a company they believed in slowly become something they no longer recognize.
